data.title: Medical Cannabis Expansion In Arkansas Blocked Days Before Election
data.description: Arkansas Supreme Court blocks a medical cannabis expansion initiative, ruling it "misleading." The decision halts any votes cast for the amendment.

data.title: Altair Engineering Shares Jumped On Wednesday: What Happened?
data.description: Altair Engineering Inc. (NASDAQ: ALTR) shares were up Wednesday following reports that Siemens AG is in discussions to acquire the company.

data.title: If You Invested $100 In This Stock 10 Years Ago, You Would Have $900 Today
Lam Research Stock Climbs After Better-Than-Expected Q1 Results: Details
data.description: Lam Research reports its first-quarter results after Wednesday's closing bell. Here's a look at the details from the report.
